note: Intentionally minimal. Auth is NOT configured here — auth.selectedType and credentials live in the owner's GLOBAL ~/.qwen/settings.json (pre-provisioned, resolves in any session); this per-workspace seed must NOT set or duplicate them. context.fileName=QWEN.md is verified against the qwen CLI reference (§11). memory.enableAutoSkill=false disables qwen-code's post-session auto-skill review so headless workers stop auto-writing .qwen/skills/<name>/SKILL.md (verified against qwen-code 0.17.1: cli.js resolves enableAutoSkill = settings.memory.enableAutoSkill ?? true, and scheduleSkillReview short-circuits to skipped:disabled when false; documented in qwen bundled docs configuration/settings.md). NO skills.paths field is set: no documented settings.json skills-wiring field exists. Do not add other unverified configuration.
